1:51 PM

semaj 2025-10-23 2:31 PM
helooo
2:32 PM
any 3d renders would never ever replace artwork, nor any of the need to keep getting the amount you're currently being asked to do
CEO of Isaac 2025-10-23 2:38 PM
Tell eno about statistics
semaj 2025-10-23 2:38 PM
the way that will help kinda explain why 3d renders are good to also be doing, is to kinda think of forsaken as a bar. the bar we have, it sells a ton of different types of drinks, but right now we're mainly marketing and advertising towards people who like wine. so people who drink cola, they're not aware that we actually have cola in the bar, and they aren't interested in drinking wine. but what both parties do enjoy, is being in the bar which actually caters to everyone, the cola group just doesn't know that we do provide cola as well. so with 3d render thumbnails, think of it as us advertising towards the people who are more likely to play because they prefer cola over wine. that doesn't mean we should stop making thumbnails for people who prefer the wine, it just means we are doing our best to let both audiences know that we cater to both cola and wine drinkers
2:41 PM
we can basically increase the amount of clicks for these two different groups (im condensing it, it's more) by making sure we have diversity of thumbnails which cater to both, whilst maintaining the quantity of our current ones which are hand drawn. Even if for example, a 3d render is performing better than a hand drawn one, we keep them both as we know we'll lose the crowd who click only on the hand drawn ones
2:42 PM
vice versa for 3d renders too
2:43 PM
ideally, we want a distinct type of thumbnail for each audience, and the ones that produce the highest quality plays. Some thumbnails may have higher clicks, but they won't be better than thumbnails with lower clicks but high session time
semaj
ideally, we want a distinct type of thumbnail for each audience, and the ones that produce the highest quality plays. Some thumbnails may have higher clicks, but they won't be better than thumbnails with lower clicks but high session time
Eno XD 2025-10-23 2:44 PM
i understand
2:44 PM
i had a kinda plan for the coming update
2:45 PM
two seperate thumbnails, one with a very fun feeling, and another with a very horror feeling
2:45 PM
how do u think that would be?
semaj 2025-10-23 2:46 PM
100% that would be really helpful to getting the best hand drawn ones, different vibes is the best way to go fs
2:47 PM
what I'd recommend as well (I'm not an artist, moreso what I do know of the roblox marketing) is to use higher amounts of contrast for the parts you want players to see and understand
2:47 PM
there was a beautiful white one which performed best and fell into the category of higher contrast
Eno XD 2025-10-23 2:47 PM
yes, that was my proudest one
2:48 PM

semaj 2025-10-23 2:48 PM

Senator 2025-10-23 2:48 PM

semaj 2025-10-23 2:51 PM
heyyy not at all, there's also aspects which are outside of your control - thumbnail performance is also linked towards players staying for the first two minutes, there's a few things with match making that can be fixed to do that. also, thumbnails constantly change in performance as well
2:52 PM
it's never a critique of the skill level or craft which went into whats being made
2:53 PM
marketing isn't really something that can also be predicted with total accuracy in terms of clicks and the quality of players which it brings in either

semaj 2025-10-23 6:54 PM
ideally, if something is higher session time but kinda of below average QPTR, you wanna go for the one with the higher session time as it’s going to give the best quality players
6:55 PM
@grandma lisab and you guys already do this, but when the update comes out, change the game page thumbnail and also the icon to let players know visually
6:56 PM
the personalisation is the advert, those 5 thumbnails the algo will test and generally use the best performing one
6:56 PM
that’s the first tab
6:56 PM
those are the ones you adjust by changing 3 and keeping the 2 best performing ones
6:57 PM
the experience page is what players see when they click on the game
6:57 PM
so that one, you will adjust during the update with the new thumbnail specifically for the update, and move it using the slider to be the first thumbnail people see when they click
6:58 PM
personalisation is easy to manage once you’ve adjusted it a few times
semaj
@grandma lisab and you guys already do this, but when the update comes out, change the game page thumbnail and also the icon to let players know visually

semaj 2025-11-02 10:48 PM
gm ! give em a week to marinate, this is promising tho. both styles will attract different crowds, I agree with the hybrid approach
10:49 PM
@Senator impressions are moreso based on the games signals to the algorithm rather than the art itself, although it does have some impact
semaj
@Senator impressions are moreso based on the games signals to the algorithm rather than the art itself, although it does have some impact
Senator 2025-11-02 10:50 PM
I see
Hytoko
it seems roblox is promoting said thumbnails in waves
semaj 2025-11-02 10:51 PM
those waves are tests of different user groups and the algo trying to figure out what works best vs what isn’t, it’s really cool tech
10:52 PM
what’s great about roblox’s compared to other platforms is that if the game is enjoyable and fun, it will generally hit to some degree or another
Eno XD
are u gonna wanna do rendered thumbnails from here on out?
semaj 2025-11-03 3:00 AM
both art and renders is the most optimal ! they will attract two different groups of users, both are equally important to appeal to
3:00 AM
so even if the art ones perform not quite as good as renders, it doesn't mean we shouldn't do art, cause we wont get the same users from only doing renders
3:02 AM
and vice versa, same if the renders sometimes dont perform as good as the art
3:04 AM
it's very similar in the way products are marketed, like think about razor blades, theres feminine vs masculine razor blades, both perform identically but appeal to different demographics. if there's only feminine razor blades, less people who use masculine ones would buy them, vice versa

Senator 2025-11-22 10:55 PM
Its not for a game thumbnail, just a contest
10:55 PM
Forwarded
@deleted-role Hi all, we are introducing an art contest! The contest spans from 10/24, to 11/22 The theme of the contest is “Myths and the Masquerade” (Halloween themed + Roblox myths!) “The masquerade is a time of celebration amongst Robloxians, and a time for myths to come out and mingle amongst the populous. Many dawning costumes of horror, mask of grandeur, and outfits of beautiful proportions to join in the celebration. All in celebration for the time of the year!” 1st place: All artist skins, 100k Robux, Their art on the banner for the official discord 2nd place: All artist skins + 50k Robux 3rd place: All artist skins + 25k Robux There will be another 17 runner ups, if chosen you will receive all artist skins ingame. Use the hashtag #RobloxiaMasquerade on Twitter to submit your entry into the contest! Be sure to include your Roblox username inside your initial post, and included as a watermark inside of your artwork. (AI generation found in your work will be a permanent ban ingame.) (CLOSED)
Originally sent: 2025-10-24 2:02 PM (edited)
10:55 PM
These were the conditions

Eno XD 2025-12-30 10:55 AM

10:56 AM

10:56 AM

Hytoko 2025-12-30 10:57 AM
Ye
10:57 AM
If they want reasoning for my decision:
10:59 AM
“With the additions I approved it works to keep the base design of our current 1x while adding additions that make other versions iconic. It helps keep our own identity while also adding more depth to it. The zipper mouth, while a cool and iconic aspect, I feel takes away from the most standout aspect of our 1x: their eye. Shining so brightly with rage and hatred that it’s the only noticeable trait on their head. The cuffs, while a cool thing with 1x4, I feel contrasted the black on their body a lot. Taking away from the simplicity.”
Hytoko
“With the additions I approved it works to keep the base design of our current 1x while adding additions that make other versions iconic. It helps keep our own identity while also adding more depth to it. The zipper mouth, while a cool and iconic aspect, I feel takes away from the most standout aspect of our 1x: their eye. Shining so brightly with rage and hatred that it’s the only noticeable trait on their head. The cuffs, while a cool thing with 1x4, I feel contrasted the black on their body a lot. Taking away from the simplicity.”

voxov 2026-01-28 12:02 AM
Alright well basically for VC servers, I think having two survivors just interacting and having like those bars that emits from their mouth to show that they are talking with eachother, or maybe a couple of other survivors doing that. For default, I think we could maybe just use a default 2d art piece that we have currently for the game right now to represent that. Then for friend servers I'm thinking that we have like two survivors like going up high and high fiving eachother.
12:04 AM
It's kinda brief, but the VC Servers and friend servers should signify what they represent, so i think the VC servers doing that and having survivors talk to eachother, and the friends signifying that they team together as friends works well
12:04 AM
i dont necessarily have an idea for again default though, but just representing what the default game is about what portraying that through art would work

Raging Pace Rework (Soy/James)
Raging Pace Rework Slashers pain points as of right now are due to looping & being crowded by sentinels. He is either in a position where he is losing time unfairly due to a survivor outjuking very readable attack patterns after looping him - or getting rotationally stunned by shed/guest/twotime...

2:05 PM

Eno XD
The synopsis of nosferatu being taken
Hytoko 2026-02-23 2:08 PM
Summary I have is that Nosferatu is one, of a handful of vampires, cursed by the Necrobloxicon. The spectre, seeing an opportunity, had an agent of theirs be sent their way. A deal was formed, a feast of endless blood and harvest for Nosferatu. In return, they would bring the Masquerade and bring about pain to the game
2:09 PM
Vess is a lot more in depth
Eno XD 2026-02-23 2:10 PM

2:14 PM
I don’t know how
2:14 PM
Heartless
2:14 PM
The spectre is in comparison to what he was like at the start
Hytoko 2026-02-23 2:15 PM
He’s still heartless
2:15 PM
Anything to satiate his own desires, his own want to be complete
2:15 PM
He’s dragging people into an endless game, one they can’t escape
2:16 PM
Some want that. Noli.
2:16 PM
Some unwillingly don’t know what they’re getting into. Slasher
2:16 PM

aateeer 2026-03-06 2:40 PM
@Eno XD @voxov a forsaken player named rodanistan64 was banned for use of slurs and spreading inappropriate content in servers related to forsaken (forsaken competitive), they did appeal and were denied by me when the situation was brought up to me (got in a gc with isaac, basil and another guy to talk). rodanistan64 attempted to ban evade by using this artists alt account and went under a different persona to get back into forsaken comp, the alt would eventually be ip banned since its presumably under the same household as their original. the ip ban also spread to the artists main account so thats what were looking at right now
2:40 PM
rodanistan has said transphobic comments under their new alias so
